creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm curious, why is this port set for MANUAL_PACKAGE_BUILD ?

<researches>

Optimizes for local machine? 
That can't be fixed?


I'd like to reset the maintainer too.  bf@ hasn't committed to this in two years and it would have been reset in the sweep anyway.  A non-staging PR must have blocked the reset.

If you want to be maintainer, great.  Otherwise we just "save" it but leave it unmaintained in case somebody wants to give it a home.
